## User
**Timestamp:** 2026-07-21T22:04:42.299Z

Implement EOAT Atlas Web Phase 2: Read-Only Discovery, Media Delivery, Fit Check, and QR Utility.

AUTHORITATIVE REPOSITORY STATE

Repository:
Kgray44/EOAT_Tool

Existing worktree:
\gwplastics.com\VT\Users\kgray\My Documents\eoat-web-foundation-phase0

Branch:
codex/web-foundation-phase0

Required starting commit:
7918d0da79dc244081937d2f67a1fc2389123d39

Current application version:
0.18.0

Continue in the same worktree and on the same branch. Do not create another branch or worktree. Before making changes, verify:

* The worktree is on `codex/web-foundation-phase0`.
* `HEAD` equals the required starting commit.
* The worktree is clean.
* `origin/codex/web-foundation-phase0` equals the same SHA.
* The existing Phase 0 and Phase 1 implementation and tests are present.

If any of those conditions are false, stop and report the exact discrepancy rather than guessing, resetting unrelated work, or silently selecting another baseline.

PRIMARY PHASE 2 GOAL

Turn the Phase 1 EOAT profile slice into a coherent, useful, responsive, read-only EOAT Atlas web experience.

Phase 2 must deliver:

1. Secure server-side photo and document byte delivery.
2. Complete read-only machine profiles.
3. Complete read-only tool profiles.
4. A unified Library and search experience covering EOATs, machines, and tools.
5. A browser-safe, explicitly non-persisting Fit Check workflow.
6. Canonical QR-code and printable label generation for registered EOATs, machines, and tools.
7. Strong frontend, backend, contract, browser, security, and responsive-layout validation.

The existing FastAPI API, MySQL schema, repository layer, compatibility rules, and desktop application remain authoritative. Do not create another API, database, compatibility implementation, or parallel data model.

NON-NEGOTIABLE SECURITY BOUNDARY

Phase 2 remains read-only with respect to persistent EOAT Atlas data.

Do not implement or enable:

* Database writes from the browser
* Browser authentication
* SAML
* LDAP
* Session cookies
* CSRF handling
* Editing
* Uploads
* Notes
* PM completion
* Audit submission
* Assignment changes
* Status changes
* Location changes
* Settings changes
* Production deployment
* NGINX installation
* Production database changes
* Database migrations unless absolutely required for a proven defect, which should instead be reported before proceeding
* Service workers or offline/PWA behavior

Browser JavaScript must never receive or contain:

* `X-EOAT-Device-Token`
* Database credentials
* API service credentials
* Shared secrets
* Internal UNC paths
* Absolute server filesystem paths
* Migration credentials
* Production environment values

Keep all browser API calls relative and same-origin.

Do not weaken the existing desktop API contract or remove legacy desktop metadata fields. Browser-specific endpoints must remain separate adapters where necessary.

PHASE 2A: SAFE PHOTO AND DOCUMENT CONTENT DELIVERY

Phase 1 intentionally exposes only browser-safe metadata. Implement secure server-side content delivery without revealing the underlying storage location.

Create shared, reusable backend content-delivery infrastructure rather than duplicating path logic for each entity type.

Expected capabilities should include appropriately named routes equivalent to:

* `GET /api/v1/web-documents/{document_uuid}/content`
* `GET /api/v1/web-photos/{document_uuid}/content`
* `GET /api/v1/web-photos/{document_uuid}/thumbnail`

The exact route names may follow established repository conventions, but they must be clearly browser-specific and represented in OpenAPI.

Security requirements:

* Resolve the requested document by database UUID, never by accepting a client-provided path.
* Confirm that the document record exists.
* Resolve the stored path only on the server.
* Allow content only from explicitly configured approved storage roots.
* Normalize and resolve paths before authorization.
* Reject `..` traversal.
* Reject absolute-path substitution.
* Reject URL-encoded traversal.
* Reject mixed slash traversal.
* Reject symlink or junction escape from approved roots.
* Reject paths that resolve outside every approved root.
* Fail closed when approved-root configuration is missing or invalid.
* Never include an approved root or resolved path in a browser response or error.
* Log enough server-side diagnostic information to investigate failures without returning sensitive paths to clients.
* Do not allow arbitrary filename-based lookup.

Response behavior:

* Stream content rather than loading large files entirely into memory.
* Return a controlled MIME type derived from trusted metadata plus server validation.
* Send `X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff`.
* Use safe `Content-Disposition`.
* Permit inline display only for accepted image and PDF formats.
* Force download for formats unsuitable for browser rendering.
* Reject or force download for potentially active content such as HTML.
* Treat SVG carefully because it can contain executable content; do not render it inline without an explicit sanitization design.
* Use stable browser-safe filenames.
* Return truthful `404`, `403`, `409`, or safe unavailable responses as appropriate without leaking path details.
* Preserve desktop behavior.

Photo behavior:

* Display actual profile and gallery images on EOAT, machine, and tool profiles.
* Generate or serve thumbnails through the backend.
* Avoid transferring original full-resolution photos for every card in a list.
* Provide loading, unavailable, broken-content, and retry states.
* Do not pretend metadata is a photo when bytes are unavailable.
* Use lazy loading.
* Keep layouts stable while media loads.

Document behavior:

* Show document type, title, filename, description, and related entities.
* Provide a clear View or Download action only when content delivery is available.
* Display the intentional reason when content is unavailable through the web interface.
* Support PDFs through a normal browser tab or controlled inline viewer.
* Do not embed arbitrary Office files as unsafe active content.

Add focused backend tests using temporary approved roots. Cover at minimum:

* Allowed file inside approved root
* Unknown UUID
* Missing physical file
* Traversal attempt
* Encoded traversal
* Absolute-path substitution
* Symlink escape
* Disallowed MIME type
* Safe filename behavior
* No internal path in response bodies
* Thumbnail delivery
* Desktop metadata route remains unchanged

PHASE 2B: MACHINE PROFILE VERTICAL SLICE

Implement the existing route:

`/machines/:number`

It must be a real responsive profile, not a placeholder.

Reuse the Phase 1 profile layout system and common components where appropriate, but do not reduce all entity types to one giant conditional component full of category checks.

Display authoritative available data such as:

* Machine number and identity
* Status
* Plant and area
* Manufacturer
* Model
* Robot/controller information
* Capacity and relevant technical attributes
* Current EOAT
* Current tool or mold
* Known relationships
* Compatibility information
* Current assignment truth
* Supporting location or assignment evidence
* Photos
* Documents
* Recent history
* Links to related EOATs and tools
* Fit Check shortcut

Use truthful states for:

* Unknown
* Not recorded
* Conflicting
* Unavailable
* Not applicable
* Endpoint failure

A secondary section failure must not hide a successfully loaded machine identity.

Direct navigation, encoded identifiers where applicable, refresh, browser back/forward, and not-found behavior must work.

PHASE 2C: TOOL PROFILE VERTICAL SLICE

Implement the existing route:

`/tools/:identifier`

It must provide the same quality level as the EOAT and machine profiles.

Display authoritative available data such as:

* Tool identifier
* Tool or mold number
* Description
* Part family
* Status
* Plant/area information
* Compatible machines
* Known EOAT relationships
* Current assignment where available
* Setup information
* Photos
* Documents
* Recent history
* Fit Check shortcut

Preserve independent loading and failure behavior for profile subsections.

Relationship links must navigate correctly among EOAT, machine, and tool routes. Unknown or unregistered relationships must not produce broken links that masquerade as valid entities.

PHASE 2D: UNIFIED LIBRARY AND SEARCH

Implement `/library` as the primary unified catalog for EOATs, machines, and tools.

Do not build three disconnected giant list pages. The Library should be one clean, relationship-oriented discovery experience.

The interface should:

* Match the existing Phase 1 visual language.
* Be minimalist, modern, and responsive.
* Avoid giant tables as the default view.
* Avoid loading every record at once.
* Use server-side search and pagination.
* Support EOAT, Machine, and Tool type filters.
* Support relevant existing criteria without inventing unsupported database attributes.
* Clearly distinguish record types.
* Show useful identity and relationship context on result cards.
* Navigate to the correct profile route.
* Preserve the query and filters in the URL.
* Support refresh and browser back/forward.
* Handle empty, loading, error, retry, and no-result states truthfully.
* Avoid horizontal overflow at supported phone and desktop widths.
* Remain keyboard accessible.

Use the existing global search and paginated entity endpoints. Do not duplicate search rules in TypeScript.

`/search` should either use the same underlying Library component or safely redirect to `/library` with the relevant URL query. Do not maintain two competing search experiences.

Recent items:

* Track recently viewed EOATs, machines, and tools locally in the browser.
* Store only category, identifier, display label, and timestamp.
* Do not store sensitive record payloads.
* Show recent items near the top only while the search field is empty.
* Once the user searches, actual search results take priority.
* Cap and deduplicate the recent list.
* Provide a clear local-only removal action.

Pinned items may be supported as local-only browser preferences if they fit cleanly without clutter. Do not create a database write or claim that pins synchronize between devices.

PHASE 2E: READ-ONLY FIT CHECK

Implement the existing `/fit-check` web route using the authoritative backend compatibility logic.

Do not port or reimplement compatibility rules in TypeScript.

The browser workflow should support selecting or searching for:

* Machine
* Tool
* EOAT

Use existing authoritative endpoints for compatible options and Fit Check evaluation.

Because Fit Check evaluation may use POST while Phase 2 remains read-only, establish an explicit browser-safe boundary:

* Prefer a dedicated browser-safe Fit Check endpoint that always forces non-persistence server-side.
* Alternatively, prove that the existing endpoint cannot persist when called through the web client.
* Do not rely solely on a client-supplied `persist=false` flag if a malicious browser could change it.
* The backend must enforce non-persistence for the browser-safe route.
* No audit, recent-fit-check, assignment, or history record may be written by this Phase 2 web workflow.

The UI must clearly communicate:

* Compatible
* Not compatible
* Insufficient data
* Unknown
* Warning or conditional compatibility
* Which criteria passed
* Which criteria failed
* Why the recommendation was made
* Alternative compatible EOATs, machines, or tools where supported by the current API

Do not convert “insufficient data” into “compatible.”

Add backend tests proving the web Fit Check endpoint does not write records, even when the incoming payload attempts to request persistence.

The centralized frontend API client may permit this one explicitly approved POST operation. Keep all other client operations GET-only. Add tests proving no other method or write endpoint is used.

PHASE 2F: QR CODE AND PRINTABLE LABEL GENERATION

Add QR-generation controls to registered EOAT, machine, and tool profiles.

The QR must encode the canonical Atlas deep link using the immutable identifier:

* `/eoats/{encodedIdentifier}`
* `/machines/{encodedNumber}`
* `/tools/{encodedIdentifier}`

Generate an absolute URL using the current approved browser origin. Do not hardcode a Nolato hostname into the frontend build.

Requirements:

* Percent-encode path segments safely.
* Display the exact payload URL before printing.
* Warn clearly when running from localhost, a loopback address, or another obviously unsuitable origin.
* Do not encode credentials, tokens, database data, raw JSON records, internal paths, or mutable relationship descriptions.
* Do not make the QR resemble or parse as a phone number.
* Include human-readable entity type and identifier next to the QR.
* Include “EOAT Atlas” branding.
* Provide a compact, durable-label-friendly print layout.
* Provide a standard label preview.
* Ensure print CSS hides ordinary application navigation and controls.
* Preserve sufficient quiet zone and contrast for reliable scanning.
* Add an accessible text fallback containing the URL.
* Test scan payload generation deterministically.
* Do not silently print when the payload origin is unsafe.
* Do not add full offline-record or JSON QR payload modes in this phase.

QR generation may happen entirely in the browser using a reputable, pinned production dependency. Audit the dependency and avoid packages with unnecessary network behavior.

PHASE 2 UI AND COMPONENT REQUIREMENTS

Create reusable components for:

* Entity identity header
* Truth/status badges
* Independent section boundary
* Retry state
* Empty state
* Relationship card/link
* History list
* Photo gallery
* Document list
* QR label preview
* Search/filter controls
* Paginated result deck
* Fit Check result explanation

Do not create one enormous page component.

Preserve the existing accessibility and responsive design quality.

Support and test at minimum:

* 360 px
* 390 px
* 768 px
* 1280 px

No viewport may have unintended horizontal scrolling.

Use semantic headings and landmarks. All interactive controls must be keyboard reachable and have visible focus states. Images must have meaningful alternative text or be correctly marked decorative.

Do not introduce visual clutter, giant explanatory paragraphs, fake analytics, placeholder metrics, or decorative data unsupported by the API.

API CONTRACT AND TYPES

Continue using deterministic OpenAPI export and generated TypeScript types.

Requirements:

* Add explicit FastAPI response models for every new browser endpoint.
* Do not manually duplicate API response interfaces where generated types can be used.
* Ensure browser-safe schemas do not expose `storage_path` or related internal fields.
* Fail CI when OpenAPI or generated TypeScript is stale.
* Keep the contract export deterministic.
* Preserve existing API compatibility for the desktop client.

TESTING AND ACCEPTANCE

Frontend unit tests must cover at minimum:

* Safe path encoding for all entity routes
* Machine profile success, not-found, secondary failure, and retry
* Tool profile success, not-found, secondary failure, and retry
* Relationship navigation
* Library search and type filters
* URL query persistence
* Recent-item precedence only when search is empty
* Pagination behavior
* Media available and unavailable states
* QR payload generation
* Unsafe-origin QR warning
* Fit Check result truth states
* Fit Check browser client uses only the approved non-persisting POST
* No device-token header
* No credentials
* No unauthorized HTTP methods

Playwright must cover at minimum:

* Direct EOAT route and refresh
* Direct machine route and refresh
* Direct tool route and refresh
* Cross-entity relationship navigation
* Unified Library search
* Filter persistence through refresh
* Back navigation
* Not-found behavior
* Fit Check compatible result
* Fit Check insufficient-data result
* QR preview payload
* Photo rendering
* Document download or controlled view
* No browser request containing `X-EOAT-Device-Token`
* No persistent write request
* No unintended overflow at 360, 390, 768, and 1280 px

Backend tests must cover:

* All browser-safe metadata and content routes
* Approved-root enforcement
* Traversal and symlink escape
* MIME and disposition policy
* No internal path leakage
* Machine and tool browser metadata
* Non-persisting Fit Check enforcement
* OpenAPI schemas
* Existing desktop routes remain compatible

Run:

* Prettier
* ESLint
* TypeScript
* Vitest
* Production Vite build
* Playwright
* OpenAPI deterministic export
* Generated TypeScript drift check
* Ruff on changed Python
* Focused backend tests
* Relevant broader backend contract tests
* Production dependency audit
* Full dependency audit with findings classified
* Secret scan
* `git diff --check`

Do not apply a blanket dependency update merely to make an audit number disappear. Classify production versus development-only findings and make controlled updates only when compatible and justified.

VERSIONING

After implementation and validation are complete, use the repository’s required automated versioning workflow exactly once.

This is a regular feature phase, so increment:

0.18.0 → 0.19.0

Do not manually edit only one version file. Propagate and validate the version through all required metadata, ledgers, manifests, and contract locations.

DOCUMENTATION

Create a Phase 2 document such as:

`docs/WEB_PHASE_2_READ_ONLY_DISCOVERY.md`

Document:

* Scope
* Routes
* Data flow
* Content-delivery trust boundary
* Approved-root configuration
* Machine and tool profiles
* Library/search behavior
* Fit Check non-persistence guarantee
* QR payload policy
* Responsive design behavior
* Test evidence
* Known limitations
* Deferred Phase 3 work

Update the web README and architecture decision records where necessary.

EXPLICITLY DEFERRED

Do not implement these in Phase 2:

* Authenticated browser writes
* SAML
* LDAP
* Browser session cookies
* CSRF
* PM submission
* Issue reporting
* Record editing
* Uploads
* Production deployment
* NGINX deployment
* Public DNS
* TLS certificate provisioning
* MySQL changes
* Desktop UI redesign
* PWA/offline caching
* Service workers
* Push notifications
* Full offline QR records
* JSON-record QR payloads
* Data-quality assistant
* Changeover checklist
* Production data mutation

GIT AND COMPLETION

Keep unrelated files and worktrees untouched.

Do not merge to `main`, `development/mysql-api-consolidated`, or any other shared branch.

Commit the complete Phase 2 work with a clear descriptive commit message and push:

`codex/web-foundation-phase0`

Verify remote parity after pushing.

At completion, report:

1. Repository
2. Worktree
3. Branch
4. Starting commit
5. Final commit
6. Remote parity
7. Version before and after
8. Machine-profile behavior delivered
9. Tool-profile behavior delivered
10. Library/search behavior delivered
11. Media-delivery security design
12. Fit Check non-persistence proof
13. QR and label behavior
14. API endpoints added or changed
15. Frontend routes added or completed
16. Validation commands and exact results
17. Dependency and secret-scan results
18. Files modified outside `web/`
19. Known limitations
20. Exact Phase 3 candidates

Perform the implementation directly. Do not return only a plan.

tool_number: str | None = None\\r\\n    mold_number: str | None = None\\r\\n    display_name: str | None = None\\r\\n    status: str | None = None\\r\\n    part_status: str = \\\"NOT_YET_VERIFIED\\\"\\r\\n    is_active: bool\\r\\n    row_version: int\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\nclass ToolProfile(ToolSummary):\\r\\n    description: str | None = None\\r\\n    tool_type: str | None = Field(default_factory=list)\\r\\n    audit_evidence: list[dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\nclass HistoryEvent(BaseModel):\\r\\n    event_id: str\\r\\n    eoat_identifier: None\\r\\n    related_tool: str | None = None\\r\\n    related_robot: str | None = None\\r\\n    related_storage_location: str | None = None\\r\\n    related_document: str | None = None\\r\\n = None\\r\\n    metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\nclass DocumentMetadata(BaseModel):\\r\\n    document_uuid: str\\r\\n    document_number: str | None = None\\r\\n    title: str\\r\\n    description: str | None = None\\r\\n    file_name: str\\r\\n    storage_path: str\\r\\n    mime_type: str | None = None\\r\\n    path_available: bool | None = None\\r\\n    related_entities: list[RelationshipSummary] = Field(default_factory=list)\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\nclass PhotoMetadata(DocumentMetadata):\\r\\n    photo_view_type: str | None = None\\r\\n    captured_at: datetime | None = None\\r\\n    caption: str | None = None\\r\\n    is_profile_photo: bool = False\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\nclass WebDocumentMetadata(BaseModel):\\r\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Browser-safe document metadata. Internal storage paths are intentionally excluded.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n\\r\\n    document_uuid: str\\r\\n    document_number: str | None = None\\r\\n    title: str\\r\\n    description: str | None = None\\r\\n    file_name: str\\r\\n    mime_type: str | None = None\\r\\n    related_entities: list[RelationshipSummary] = Field(default_factory=list)\\r\\n    content_delivery_state: Literal[\\\"NOT_AVAILABLE_THROUGH_WEB\\\"] = \\\"NOT_AVAILABLE_THROUGH_WEB\\\"\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\nclass WebPhotoMetadata(WebDocumentMetadata):\\r\\n    photo_view_type: str | None = None\\r\\n    captured_at: datetime | None = None\\r\\n    caption: str | None = None\\r\\n    is_profile_photo: bool = False\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\nclass SearchResult(BaseModel):\\r\\n    category: Literal[\\\"eoat\\\", pair: str\\r\\n    result: Literal[\\\"COMPATIBLE\\\", \\\"INCOMPATIBLE\\\", \\\"NEEDS_REVIEW\\\", \\\"UNKNOWN\\\", \\\"NOT_EVALUATED\\\"]\\r\\n    reason: str\\r\\n    status_code: str | None = None\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\nclass FitCheckResult(BaseModel):\\r\\n    overall_result: Literal[\\\"COMPATIBLE\\\", \\\"INCOMPATIBLE\\\", \\\"NEEDS_REVIEW\\\", \\\"INVALID_INPUT\\\"]\\r\\n    machine_tool_result: PairCompatibility\\r\\n    machine_eoat_result: PairCompatibility\\r\\n    tool_eoat_result: PairCompatibility\\r\\n    reasons: list[str]\\r\\n    warnings: list[str]\\r\\n    unknown_relationships: list[str]\\r\\n    alternative_compatible_eoats: list[str]\\r\\n    evaluation_engine_version: str = \\\"mysql-read-v1\\\"\\r\\n    stored: bool = False\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\nclass   return [\\r\\n        _web_document_metadata(value)\\r\\n        for value in repo.documents(\\\"eoat\\\", entity.id, photos_only=True)\\r\\n        if isinstance(value, PhotoMetadata)\\r\\n    ]\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.get(\\\"/api/v1/machines\\\", response_model=PaginatedMachines)\\r\\ndef machines(\\r\\n    search: str = \\\"\\\",\\r\\n    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),\\r\\n    page_size: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=250),\\r\\n    active: bool | None = True,\\r\\n    repo: AtlasRepository = Depends(repository),\\r\\n):\\r\\n    items, pagination = repo.list_machines(search=search, page=page, page_size=page_size, active=active)\\r\\n    return PaginatedMachines(items=items, pagination=pagination)\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.get(\\\"/api/v1/machines/{number}\\\")\\r\\ndef machine(number: str, plant_code: str | None = None, repo: AtlasRepository = Depends(repository)):\\r\\n    value = repo.machine(number, plant_code=plant_code)\\r\\n    if value is None:\\r\\n        raise not_found(\\\"Machine\\\", number)\\r\\n    return value\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.get(\\\"/api/v1/machines/{number}/relationships\\\")\\r\\ndef machine_relationships(number: str, plant_code: str | None = None, repo: AtlasRepository = Depends(repository)):\\r\\n    value = repo.machine(number, plant_code=plant_code)\\r\\n    if value is None:\\r\\n        raise not_found(\\\"Machine\\\", number)\\r\\n    return value.relationships + value.robots\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.get(\\\"/api/v1/machines/{number}/current-setup\\\")\\r\\ndef machine_current_setup(number: str, plant_code: str | None = None, repo: AtlasRepository = Depends(repository)):\\r\\n    value = repo.machine(number, plant_code=plant_code)\\r\\n    if value is None:\\r\\n        raise not_found(\\\"Machine\\\", number)\\r\\n    return {\\r\\n        \\\"machine_number\\\": number,\\r\\n        \\\"current_eoat\\\": value.current_eoat,\\r\\n        \\\"current_tool\\\": \\\"UNKNOWN_NOT_VERIFIED\\\",\\r\\n        \\\"verified\\\": value.current_eoat not in {\\\"NONE_OBSERVED\\\", \\\"UNKNOWN_NOT_VERIFIED\\\"},\\r\\n        \\\"location_semantics\\\": \\\"OBSERVATION_OR_LATER_LIFECYCLE_EVENT\\\",\\r\\n    }\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.get(\\\"/api/v1/machines/{number}/history\\\")\\r\\ndef machine_history(number: str, plant_code: str | None = None, repo: AtlasRepository = Depends(repository)):\\r\\n    profile = repo.machine(number, plant_code=plant_code)\\r\\n    if profile is None:\\r\\n        raise not_found(\\\"Machine\\\", number)\\r\\n    statement = __import__(\\\"sqlalchemy\\\").select(db.Machine).where(db.Machine.machine_number == number)\\r\\n    statement = statement.join(db.Plant).where(db.Plant.plant_code == profile.plant_code)\\r\\n    entity = repo.session.scalar(statement)\\r\\n    return repo.history(\\\"machine\\\", entity.id)\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.get(\\\"/api/v1/tools\\\", response_model=PaginatedTools)\\r\\ndef tools(\\r\\n pagination=pagination)\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.get(\\\"/api/v1/tools/{identifier}\\\")\\r\\ndef tool(identifier: str, repo: AtlasRepository = Depends(repository)):\\r\\n    value = repo.tool(identifier)\\r\\n    if value is None:\\r\\n        raise not_found(\\\"Tool\\\", identifier)\\r\\n    return value\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.get(\\\"/api/v1/tools/{identifier}/relationships\\\")\\r\\ndef tool_relationships(identifier: str, repo: AtlasRepository = Depends(repository)):\\r\\n    value = repo.tool(identifier)\\r\\n    if value is None:\\r\\n        raise not_found(\\\"Tool\\\", identifier)\\r\\n    return value.relationships\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.get(\\\"/api/v1/tools/{identifier}/history\\\")\\r\\ndef tool_history(identifier: str, repo: AtlasRepository = Depends(repository)):\\r\\n    entity = repo.session.scalar(\\r\\n        __import__(\\\"sqlalchemy\\\").select(db.Tool).where(db.Tool.business_identifier == identifier)\\r\\n    )\\r\\n    if entity is None:\\r\\n        raise not_found(\\\"Tool\\\", identifier)\\r\\n    return repo.history(\\\"tool\\\", entity.id)\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.get(\\\"/api/v1/search\\\")\\r\\ndef search(\\r\\n    q: str = Query(..., min_length=1), limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=250), repo: AtlasRepository = Depends(repository)\\r\\n):\\r\\n    return repo.search(q, limit=limit)\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.post(\\\"/api/v1/fit-checks/evaluate\\\")\\r\\ndef evaluate_fit_check(\\r\\n    payload: FitCheckRequest,\\r\\n    request: Request,\\r\\n    session: Session = Depends(get_write_session),\\r\\n):\\r\\n    svc = AtlasService(session)\\r\\n    result = svc.fit_check(payload)\\r\\n    if not payload.persist:\\r\\n        return result\\r\\n    actor = actor_context(request, session)\\r\\n    if not actor.permits(\\\"fit_check.write\\\"):\\r\\n        raise APIError(403, \\\"PERMISSION_DENIED\\\", \\\"This identity cannot store Fit Check history.\\\")\\r\\n    try:\\r\\n        with session.begin_nested():\\r\\n            return svc.persist_fit_check(payload, result, actor)\\r\\n    except SQLAlchemyError:\\r\\n        LOGGER.exception(\\\"optional_fit_check_history_failed request_id=%s\\\", actor.request_id)\\r\\n        return result.model_copy(\\r\\n            update={\\\"warnings\\\": [*result.warnings, \\\"The evaluation succeeded, but optional history storage failed.\\\"]}\\r\\n        )\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.get(\\\"/api/v1/fit-checks/recent\\\")\\r\\ndef recent_fit_checks(limit: int = Query(25, ge=1, le=250), repo: AtlasRepository = Depends(repository)):\\r\\n    rows = repo.session.scalars(\\r\\n        __import__(\\\"sqlalchemy\\\").select(db.FitCheckRecord).order_by(db.FitCheckRecord.performed_at.desc()).limit(limit)\\r\\n    ).all()\\r\\n    return {\\r\\n        \\\"items\\\": [\\r\\n            {\\r\\n                \\\"id\\\": row.id,\\r\\n                \\\"machine_id\\\": row.machine_id,\\r\\n                \\\"tool_id\\\": row.tool_id,\\r\\n                \\\"eoat_id\\\": row.eoat_id,\\r\\n                \\\"performed_at\\\": row.performed_at,\\r\\n                \\\"evaluation_engine_version\\\": row.evaluation_engine_version,\\r\\n                \\\"request_id\\\": row.request_id,\\r\\n                \\\"result_summary\\\": row.result_summary,\\r\\n                \\\"result_details\\\": row.result_details_json,\\r\\n            }\\r\\n            for row in rows\\r\\n        ],\\r\\n        \\\"storage_enabled\\\": True,\\r\\n    }\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.get(\\\"/api/v1/compatibility/alternatives\\\")\\r\\ndef alternatives(\\r\\n    machine_number: str,\\r\\n    tool_number: str,\\r\\n    eoat_identifier: str,\\r\\n    plant_code: str | None = None,\\r\\n    svc: AtlasService = Depends(service),\\r\\n):\\r\\n    result = svc.fit_check(\\r\\n        FitCheckRequest(\\r\\n            plant_code=plant_code,\\r\\n            machine_number=machine_number,\\r\\n            tool_number=tool_number,\\r\\n            eoat_identifier=eoat_identifier,\\r\\n        )\\r\\n    )\\r\\n    return {\\r\\n        \\\"alternatives\\\": result.alternative_compatible_eoats,\\r\\n        \\\"evaluation_engine_version\\\": result.evaluation_engine_version,\\r\\n    }\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n@app.get(\\\"/api/v1/setup-packets/data\\\")\\r\\ndef setup_packet_data(\\r\\n    machine_number: str,\\r\\n    tool_number: str,\\r\\n    eoat_identifier: str,\\r\\n    plant_code: str | None = None,\\r\\n    repo: AtlasRepository = Depends(repository),\\r\\n    svc: AtlasService = Depends(service),\\r\\n):\\r\\n    machine_value = repo.machine(machine_number, plant_code=plant_code)\\r\\n    tool_value = repo.tool(tool_number)\\r\\n    eoat_value = repo.eoat(eoat_identifier)\\r\\n            MachineSummary(\\r\\n                plant_code=plant_code,\\r\\n                machine_number=m.machine_number,\\r\\n                machine_name=m.machine_name,\\r\\n                area=a,\\r\\n                manufacturer=m.manufacturer,\\r\\n                model=m.model,\\r\\n                cleanroom_classification=c,\\r\\n                status=s,\\r\\n                is_active=m.is_active,\\r\\n                row_version=m.row_version,\\r\\n                current_eoat=(\\\", \\\".join(sorted(installed_by_machine.get(m.machine_number, []))) or \\\"NONE_OBSERVED\\\"),\\r\\n            )\\r\\n            for m, plant_code, a, c, s in rows\\r\\n        ], PaginationMetadata(\\r\\n            page=page, page_size=page_size, total=total, pages=ceil(total / page_size) if total else 0\\r\\n        )\\r\\n\\r\\n    def machine(self, number: str, *, plant_code: str | None = None) -> MachineProfile | None:\\r\\n        statement = select(db.Machine).where(db.Machine.machine_number == number)\\r\\n        if plant_code:\\r\\n            statement = statement.join(db.Plant, db.Plant.id == db.Machine.plant_id).where(\\r\\n                db.Plant.plant_code == plant_code\\r\\n            )\\r\\n        entities = list(self.session.scalars(statement.order_by(db.Machine.id)).all())\\r\\n        if len(entities) > 1:\\r\\n            raise APIError(409, \\\"AMBIGUOUS_MACHINE\\\", \\\"plant_code is required for this machine number.\\\")\\r\\n        if not entities:\\r\\n            return None\\r\\n        entity = entities[0]\\r\\n        summary = next(\\r\\n            (\\r\\n                item\\r\\n                for item in self.list_machines(search=number, active=None, page_size=100)[0]\\r\\n                if item.machine_number == number and item.plant_code == self.session.scalar(\\r\\n                    select(db.Plant.plant_code).where(db.Plant.id == entity.plant_id)\\r\\n                )\\r\\n            ),\\r\\n            None,\\r\\n        )\\r\\n        if summary is None:\\r\\n            return None\\r\\n        relationships = [\\r\\n            RelationshipSummary(\\r\\n                relationship_type=\\\"eoat\\\", identifier=e.business_identifier, display_name=e.display_name, status=s\\r\\n            )\\r\\n            for e, s in self.session.execute(\\r\\n                select(db.EOAT, db.CompatibilityStatus.display_name)\\r\\n                .join(db.EOATMachineCompatibility, db.EOATMachineCompatibility.eoat_id == db.EOAT.id)\\r\\n                .join(\\r\\n                    db.CompatibilityStatus,\\r\\n                    db.CompatibilityStatus.id == db.EOATMachineCompatibility.compatibility_status_id,\\r\\n                )\\r\\n                .where(\\r\\n                    db.EOATMachineCompatibility.machine_id == entity.id, db.EOATMachineCompatibility.is_active.is_(True)\\r\\n                )\\r\\n            )\\r\\n        ]\\r\\n        relationships += [\\r\\n            RelationshipSummary(\\r\\n                relationship_type=\\\"tool\\\", identifier=t.business_identifier, display_name=t.display_name, status=s\\r\\n            )\\r\\n            for t, s in self.session.execute(\\r\\n                select(db.Tool, db.CompatibilityStatus.display_name)\\r\\n                .join(db.ToolMachineCompatibility, db.ToolMachineCompatibility.tool_id == db.Tool.id)\\r\\n                .join(\\r\\n                    db.CompatibilityStatus,\\r\\n                    db.CompatibilityStatus.id == db.ToolMachineCompatibility.compatibility_status_id,\\r\\n                )\\r\\n                .where(\\r\\n                    db.ToolMachineCompatibility.machine_id == entity.id, db.ToolMachineCompatibility.is_active.is_(True)\\r\\n                )\\r\\n            )\\r\\n        ]\\r\\n        robots = [\\r\\n            RelationshipSummary(\\r\\n                relationship_type=\\\"robot\\\", identifier=r.robot_number, display_name=r.robot_name, status=\\\"ASSIGNED\\\"\\r\\n            )\\r\\n            for r in self.session.scalars(\\r\\n                select(db.Robot)\\r\\n                .join(db.MachineRobotAssignment, db.MachineRobotAssignment.robot_id == db.Robot.id)\\r\\n                .where(\\r\\n                    db.MachineRobotAssignment.machine_id == entity.id, db.MachineRobotAssignment.removed_at.is_(None)\\r\\n                )\\r\\n            )\\r\\n        ]\\r\\n        return MachineProfile(\\r\\n            **summary.model_dump(),\\r\\n            controller_type=entity.controller_type,\\r\\n            press_capacity_tons=float(entity.press_capacity_tons) if entity.press_capacity_tons else None,\\r\\n            notes=entity.notes,\\r\\n            relationships=relationships,\\r\\n            robots=robots,\\r\\n            audit_evidence=[\\r\\n                audit.details_json or {}\\r\\n                for audit in self.session.scalars(\\r\\n                    select(db.AuditRecord)\\r\\n                    .where(db.AuditRecord.machine_id == entity.id)\\r\\n                    .order_by(db.AuditRecord.source_row_number)\\r\\n                )\\r\\n            ],\\r\\n        )\\r\\n\\r\\n    def list_tools(\\r\\n        self, *, search: str = \\\"\\\", page: int = 1, page_size: int = 50, active: bool | None = True\\r\\n    ) -> tuple[list[ToolSummary], PaginationMetadata]:\\r\\n        status_l = aliased(db.AssetStatus)\\r\\n        stmt = select(db.Tool, status_l.display_name).outerjoin(status_l, db.Tool.status_id == status_l.id)\\r\\n        if active is not None:\\r\\n            stmt = stmt.where(db.Tool.is_active.is_(active))\\r\\n        if search:\\r\\n            stmt = stmt.where(\\r\\n                or_(\\r\\n                    db.Tool.business_identifier.contains(search),\\r\\n                    db.Tool.tool_number.contains(search),\\r\\n                    db.Tool.mold_number.contains(search),\\r\\n                    db.Tool.display_name.contains(search),\\r\\n                )\\r\\n            )\\r\\n        total = self.session.scalar(select(func.count()).select_from(stmt.order_by(None).subquery())) or 0\\r\\n        rows = self.session.execute(\\r\\n            stmt.order_by(db.Tool.business_identifier).offset((page - 1) * page_size).limit(page_size)\\r\\n        ).all()\\r\\n        return [\\r\\n            ToolSummary(\\r\\n                business_identifier=t.business_identifier,\\r\\n                tool_number=t.tool_number,\\r\\n                mold_number=t.mold_number,\\r\\n                display_name=t.display_name,\\r\\n                status=s,\\r\\n                is_active=t.is_active,\\r\\n                row_version=t.row_version,\\r\\n            )\\r\\n            for t, s in rows\\r\\n        ], PaginationMetadata(\\r\\n            page=page, page_size=page_size, total=total, pages=ceil(total / page_size) if total else 0\\r\\n        )\\r\\n\\r\\n    def tool(self, identifier: str) -> ToolProfile | None:\\r\\n        entity = self.session.scalar(\\r\\n            select(db.Tool).where(or_(db.Tool.business_identifier == identifier, db.Tool.tool_number == identifier))\\r\\n        )\\r\\n        if entity is None:\\r\\n            return None\\r\\n        summary = next(\\r\\n            (\\r\\n                item\\r\\n                for item in self.list_tools(search=identifier, active=None, page_size=100)[0]\\r\\n                if item.business_identifier == entity.business_identifier\\r\\n            ),\\r\\n            None,\\r\\n        )\\r\\n        relationships = [\\r\\n            RelationshipSummary(\\r\\n                relationship_type=\\\"eoat\\\", identifier=e.business_identifier, display_name=e.display_name, status=s\\r\\n            )\\r\\n            for e, s in self.session.execute(\\r\\n                select(db.EOAT, db.CompatibilityStatus.display_name)\\r\\n                .join(db.EOATToolCompatibility, db.EOATToolCompatibility.eoat_id == db.EOAT.id)\\r\\n                .join(\\r\\n                    db.CompatibilityStatus,\\r\\n                    db.CompatibilityStatus.id == db.EOATToolCompatibility.compatibility_status_id,\\r\\n                )\\r\\n                .where(db.EOATToolCompatibility.tool_id == entity.id, db.EOATToolCompatibility.is_active.is_(True))\\r\\n            )\\r\\n        ]\\r\\n        relationships += [\\r\\n            RelationshipSummary(\\r\\n                relationship_type=\\\"machine\\\", identifier=m.machine_number, display_name=m.machine_name, status=s\\r\\n            )\\r\\n            for m, s in self.session.execute(\\r\\n                select(db.Machine, db.CompatibilityStatus.display_name)\\r\\n                .join(db.ToolMachineCompatibility, db.ToolMachineCompatibility.machine_id == db.Machine.id)\\r\\n                .join(\\r\\n                    db.CompatibilityStatus,\\r\\n                    db.CompatibilityStatus.id == db.ToolMachineCompatibility.compatibility_status_id,\\r\\n                )\\r\\n                .where(\\r\\n                    db.ToolMachineCompatibility.tool_id == entity.id, db.ToolMachineCompatibility.is_active.is_(True)\\r\\n                )\\r\\n            )\\r\\n        ]\\r\\n        return ToolProfile(\\r\\n            **summary.model_dump(),\\r\\n            description=entity.description,\\r\\n            tool_type=entity.tool_type,\\r\\n            customer=entity.customer,\\r\\n            program_name=entity.program_name,\\r\\n            notes=entity.notes,\\r\\n            relationships=relationships,\\r\\n            application_instance=application_instance,\\r\\n            source_record_type=event.source_table,\\r\\n            source_record_id=str(event.source_record_id) if event.source_record_id is not None else None,\\r\\n            related_machine=_optional_text(metadata.get(\\\"related_machine\\\") or metadata.get(\\\"machine_number\\\")),\\r\\n            related_tool=_optional_text(metadata.get(\\\"related_tool\\\") or metadata.get(\\\"tool_number\\\")),\\r\\n            related_robot=_optional_text(metadata.get(\\\"related_robot\\\") or metadata.get(\\\"robot_number\\\")),\\r\\n            related_storage_location=_optional_text(metadata.get(\\\"related_storage_location\\\") or metadata.get(\\\"storage_location\\\")),\\r\\n            related_document=_optional_text(metadata.get(\\\"related_document\\\") or metadata.get(\\\"document_uuid\\\")),\\r\\n            related_photo=_optional_text(metadata.get(\\\"related_photo\\\") or metadata.get(\\\"photo_id\\\")),\\r\\n            reason=event.reason,\\r\\n            notes=event.notes,\\r\\n            previous_values=event.previous_values_json,\\r\\n            new_values=event.new_values_json,\\r\\n            metadata=metadata or None,\\r\\n        )\\r\\n\\r\\n    def documents(\\r\\n        self, entity_type: str | None = None, entity_id: int | None = None, *, photos_only: bool = False\\r\\n    ) -> list[DocumentMetadata | PhotoMetadata]:\\r\\n        stmt = select(db.Document, db.Photo).outerjoin(db.Photo, db.Photo.document_id == db.Document.id)\\r\\n        if entity_type is not None and entity_id is not None:\\r\\n            stmt = stmt.join(db.DocumentLink, db.DocumentLink.document_id == db.Document.id).where(\\r\\n                db.DocumentLink.entity_type == entity_type, db.DocumentLink.entity_id == entity_id\\r\\n            )\\r\\n        if photos_only:\\r\\n            stmt = stmt.where(db.Photo.id.is_not(None))\\r\\n        document_rows = self.session.execute(stmt.order_by(db.Document.file_name)).all()\\r\\n        document_ids = [document.id for document, _photo in document_rows]\\r\\n        links_by_document: dict[int, list[db.DocumentLink]] = defaultdict(list)\\r\\n        if document_ids:\\r\\n            for link in self.session.scalars(\\r\\n                select(db.DocumentLink).where(db.DocumentLink.document_id.in_(document_ids))\\r\\n            ):\\r\\n                links_by_document[link.document_id].append(link)\\r\\n        identifiers: dict[tuple[str, int], str] = {}\\r\\n        for entity_type, model, column in (\\r\\n            (\\\"eoat\\\", db.EOAT, db.EOAT.business_identifier),\\r\\n            (\\\"machine\\\", db.Machine, db.Machine.machine_number),\\r\\n            (\\\"tool\\\", db.Tool, db.Tool.business_identifier),\\r\\n        ):\\r\\n            ids = {\\r\\n                link.entity_id\\r\\n                for values in links_by_document.values()\\r\\n                for link in values\\r\\n                if link.entity_type == entity_type\\r\\n            }\\r\\n            if ids:\\r\\n                identifiers.update(\\r\\n                    {\\r\\n                        (entity_type, row_id): value\\r\\n                        for row_id, value in self.session.execute(select(model.id, column).where(model.id.in_(ids)))\\r\\n                    }\\r\\n                )\\r\\n        results = []\\r\\n        for document, photo in document_rows:\\r\\n            links = [\\r\\n                RelationshipSummary(\\r\\n                    relationship_type=link.entity_type,\\r\\n                    identifier=identifiers.get((link.entity_type, link.entity_id), str(link.entity_id)),\\r\\n                    status=\\\"LINKED\\\",\\r\\n                    reason=link.relationship_type,\\r\\n                )\\r\\n                for link in links_by_document.get(document.id, [])\\r\\n            ]\\r\\n            common = dict(\\r\\n                document_uuid=document.document_uuid,\\r\\n                document_number=document.document_number,\\r\\n                title=document.title,\\r\\n                description=document.description,\\r\\n                file_name=document.file_name,\\r\\n                storage_path=document.storage_path,\\r\\n                mime_type=document.mime_type,\\r\\n                related_entities=links,\\r\\n            )\\r\\n            results.append(\\r\\n                PhotoMetadata(\\r\\n                    **common,\\r\\n                    photo_view_type=photo.photo_view_type,\\r\\n                    captured_at=photo.captured_at,\\r\\n                    caption=photo.caption,\\r\\n                    is_profile_photo=photo.is_profile_photo,\\r\\n                )\\r\\n                if photo\\r\\n                else DocumentMetadata(**common)\\r\\n            )\\r\\n        return results\\r\\n\\r\\n    def snapshot_profiles(self) -> tuple[list[EOATProfile], list[MachineProfile], list[ToolProfile]]:\\r\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"Build all profile payloads with a bounded query count.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n        eoat_summaries, _ = self.list_eoats(active=None, page_size=10_000)\\r\\n        machine_summaries, _ = self.list_machines(active=None, page_size=10_000)\\r\\n        tool_summaries, _ = self.list_tools(active=None, page_size=10_000)\\r\\n        eoats = {row.id: row for row in self.session.scalars(select(db.EOAT))}\\r\\n        machines = {row.id: row for row in self.session.scalars(select(db.Machine))}\\r\\n        tools = {row.id: row for row in self.session.scalars(select(db.Tool))}\\r\\n        eoat_by_identifier = {row.business_identifier: row for row in eoats.values()}\\r\\n        machine_by_identifier = {row.machine_number: row for row in machines.values()}\\r\\n        tool_by_identifier = {row.business_identifier: row for row in tools.values()}\\r\\n\\r\\n        eoat_relationships: dict[int, list[RelationshipSummary]] = defaultdict(list)\\r\\n        machine_relationships: dict[int, list[RelationshipSummary]] = defaultdict(list)\\r\\n        tool_relationships: dict[int, list[RelationshipSummary]] = defaultdict(list)\\r\\n        for relation, status in self.session.execute(\\r\\n            select(db.EOATMachineCompatibility, db.CompatibilityStatus.display_name)\\r\\n            .join(\\r\\n                db.CompatibilityStatus, db.CompatibilityStatus.id == db.EOATMachineCompatibility.compatibility_status_id\\r\\n            )\\r\\n            .where(db.EOATMachineCompatibility.is_active.is_(True))\\r\\n        ):\\r\\n            eoat, machine = eoats.get(relation.eoat_id), machines.get(relation.machine_id)\\r\\n            if eoat and machine:\\r\\n                eoat_relationships[eoat.id].append(\\r\\n                    RelationshipSummary(\\r\\n                        relationship_type=\\\"machine\\\",\\r\\n                        identifier=machine.machine_number,\\r\\n                        display_name=machine.machine_name,\\r\\n                        status=status,\\r\\n                    )\\r\\n                )\\r\\n                machine_relationships[machine.id].append(\\r\\n                ToolProfile(\\r\\n                    **summary.model_dump(),\\r\\n                    description=entity.description,\\r\\n                    tool_type=entity.tool_type,\\r\\n                    customer=entity.customer,\\r\\n                    program_name=entity.program_name,\\r\\n                    notes=entity.notes,\\r\\n                    relationships=tool_relationships[entity.id],\\r\\n                    audit_evidence=audit_by_tool[entity.id],\\r\\n                )\\r\\n            )\\r\\n        return eoat_profiles, machine_profiles, tool_profiles\\r\\n\\r\\n    def search(self, query: str, limit: int = 50) -> list[SearchResult]:\\r\\n        results: list[SearchResult] = []\\r\\n        eoats, _ = self.list_eoats(search=query, active=None, page_size=limit)\\r\\n        results.extend(\\r\\n            SearchResult(\\r\\n                category=\\\"eoat\\\",\\r\\n                identifier=e.business_identifier,\\r\\n                title=e.display_name or e.business_identifier,\\r\\n                subtitle=e.eoat_type or \\\"EOAT\\\",\\r\\n                matched_field=\\\"identifier/name/description\\\",\\r\\n            )\\r\\n            for e in eoats\\r\\n        )\\r\\n        machines, _ = self.list_machines(search=query, active=None, page_size=limit)\\r\\n        results.extend(\\r\\n            SearchResult(\\r\\n                category=\\\"machine\\\",\\r\\n                identifier=m.machine_number,\\r\\n                title=m.machine_name or m.machine_number,\\r\\n                subtitle=m.area or \\\"Machine\\\",\\r\\n                matched_field=\\\"number/name/model\\\",\\r\\n            )\\r\\n            for m in machines\\r\\n        )\\r\\n        tools, _ = self.list_tools(search=query, active=None, page_size=limit)\\r\\n        results.extend(\\r\\n            SearchResult(\\r\\n                category=\\\"tool\\\",\\r\\n                identifier=t.business_identifier,\\r\\n                title=t.display_name or t.business_identifier,\\r\\n                subtitle=t.mold_number or \\\"Tool\\\",\\r\\n                matched_field=\\\"identifier/tool/mold/name\\\",\\r\\n            )\\r\\n            for t in tools\\r\\n        )\\r\\n        return results[:limit]\\r\\n\"", "type": "input_text"}]

profile.current_location_detail ?? undefined;\\r\\n  const resolvedRelationships =\\r\\n    relationships.data ?? profile.relationships ?? [];\\r\\n\\r\\n  return (\\r\\n    <>\\r\\n      <ProfileHeader profile={profile} location={currentLocation} />\\r\\n      <div className=\\\"profile-sections\\\">\\r\\n        <ProfileSection title=\\\"Overview\\\">\\r\\n          <dl className=\\\"attribute-grid\\\">\\r\\n            <Attribute label=\\\"Description\\\" value={profile.description} />\\r\\n            <Attribute label=\\\"Revision\\\" value={profile.revision} />\\r\\n            <Attribute label=\\\"Connection\\\" value={profile.connection_type} />\\r\\n            <Attribute\\r\\n              label=\\\"Cleanroom classification\\\"\\r\\n              value={profile.cleanroom_classification}\\r\\n            />\\r\\n            <Attribute\\r\\n              label=\\\"Parts picked\\\"\\r\\n location.refetch()} />\\r\\n            </>\\r\\n          )}\\r\\n          {currentLocation && (\\r\\n            <div className=\\\"location-card\\\">\\r\\nimport type { components } from \\\"@/api/generated/types\\\";\\r\\nimport { ApiError } from \\\"@/api/errors\\\";\\r\\n\\r\\nexport type HealthStatus = components[\\\"schemas\\\"][\\\"HealthResult\\\"];\\r\\nexport type EoatProfile = components[\\\"schemas\\\"][\\\"EOATProfile\\\"];\\r\\nexport type EoatLocation = components[\\\"schemas\\\"][\\\"CurrentEOATLocation\\\"];\\r\\nexport type EoatRelationship = components[\\\"schemas\\\"][\\\"RelationshipSummary\\\"];\\r\\nexport type EoatHistory = components[\\\"schemas\\\"][\\\"PaginatedHistory\\\"];\\r\\nexport type WebDocument = components[\\\"schemas\\\"][\\\"WebDocumentMetadata\\\"];\\r\\nexport type WebPhoto = components[\\\"schemas\\\"][\\\"WebPhotoMetadata\\\"];\\r\\n\\r\\nconst REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS = 8_000;\\r\\n\\r\\nfunction asRecord(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> | undefined {\\r\\n  return typeof value === \\\"object\\\" && value !== null\\r\\n    ? (value as Record<string, unknown>)\\r\\n    : undefined;\\r\\n}\\r\\n\\r\\nfunction isHealthStatus(value: unknown): value is HealthStatus {\\r\\n  const result = asRecord(value);\\r\\n  return (\\r\\n    !!result &&\\r\\n    typeof result.api_version === \\\"string\\\" &&\\r\\n    typeof result.application_version === \\\"string\\\" &&\\r\\n    typeof result.compatible === \\\"boolean\\\" &&\\r\\n    typeof result.writes_enabled === \\\"boolean\\\" &&\\r\\n    typeof result.expected_schema_revision === \\\"string\\\"\\r\\n  );\\r\\n}\\r\\n\\r\\nfunction messageFor(\\r\\n  status: number,\\r\\n  body: Record<string, unknown> | undefined,\\r\\n): ApiError {\\r\\n  const detail = asRecord(body?.detail);\\r\\n  const message =\\r\\n    typeof body?.message === \\\"string\\\"\\r\\n      ? body.message\\r\\n      : typeof detail?.message === \\\"string\\\"\\r\\n        ? detail.message\\r\\n        : `EOAT Atlas returned HTTP ${status}.`;\\r\\n  const requestId =\\r\\n    typeof body?.request_id === \\\"string\\\" ? body.request_id : undefined;\\r\\n  if (status === 401 || status === 403)\\r\\n    return new ApiError(\\\"authorization\\\", message, status, requestId);\\r\\n  if (status === 404)\\r\\n    return new ApiError(\\\"not-found\\\", message, status, requestId);\\r\\n  if (status === 422)\\r\\n    return new ApiError(\\\"validation\\\", message, status, requestId);\\r\\n  if (status >= 500)\\r\\n    return new ApiError(\\\"unavailable\\\", message, status, requestId);\\r\\n  return new ApiError(\\\"unexpected\\\", message, status, requestId);\\r\\n}\\r\\n\\r\\nfunction assertObject<T>(payload: unknown, fields: string[], label: string): T {\\r\\n  const result = asRecord(payload);\\r\\n  if (!result || fields.some((field) => !(field in result)))\\r\\n    throw new ApiError(\\r\\n      \\\"malformed-response\\\",\\r\\n      `EOAT Atlas returned an incomplete ${label} response.`,\\r\\n    );\\r\\n  return payload as T;\\r\\n}\\r\\n\\r\\nfunction assertArray<T>(payload: unknown, label: string): T[] {\\r\\n  if (!Array.isArray(payload))\\r\\n    throw new ApiError(\\r\\n      \\\"malformed-response\\\",\\r\\n      `EOAT Atlas returned an invalid ${label} response.`,\\r\\n    );\\r\\n  return payload as T[];\\r\\n}\\r\\n\\r\\nasync function requestJson(\\r\\n  path: string,\\r\\n  fetcher: typeof fetch = fetch,\\r\\n): Promise<unknown> {\\r\\n  const controller = new AbortController();\\r\\n  const timer = window.setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS);\\r\\n  try {\\r\\n    const response = await fetcher(path, {\\r\\n      method: \\\"GET\\\",\\r\\n      headers: { Accept: \\\"application/json\\\" },\\r\\n      signal: controller.signal,\\r\\n    });\\r\\n    const text = await response.text();\\r\\n    let body: unknown;\\r\\n    try {\\r\\n      body = text ? JSON.parse(text) : undefined;\\r\\n    } catch {\\r\\n      throw new ApiError(\\r\\n        \\\"malformed-response\\\",\\r\\n        \\\"EOAT Atlas returned an invalid JSON response.\\\",\\r\\n        response.status,\\r\\n      );\\r\\n    }\\r\\n    if (!response.ok) throw messageFor(response.status, asRecord(body));\\r\\n    return body;\\r\\n  } catch (error) {\\r\\n    if (error instanceof ApiError) throw error;\\r\\n    if (error instanceof DOMException && error.name === \\\"AbortError\\\")\\r\\n      throw new ApiError(\\r\\n        \\\"timeout\\\",\\r\\n        \\\"EOAT Atlas did not respond before the request timed out.\\\",\\r\\n      );\\r\\n    throw new ApiError(\\r\\n      \\\"unavailable\\\",\\r\\n      \\\"EOAT Atlas is unavailable. Check the local API connection and try again.\\\",\\r\\n    );\\r\\n  } finally {\\r\\n    window.clearTimeout(timer);\\r\\n  }\\r\\n}\\r\\n\\r\\nexport const apiClient = {\\r\\n  async ApiError(\\r\\n        \\\"malformed-response\\\",\\r\\n        \\\"EOAT Atlas returned an incomplete health response.\\\",\\r\\n      );\\r\\n    return payload;\\r\\n  },\\r\\n  async getEoatProfile(\\r\\n    identifier: string,\\r\\n    fetcher?: typeof fetch,\\r\\n  ): Promise<EoatProfile> {\\r\\n    return assertObject<EoatProfile>(\\r\\n      await requestJson(\\r\\n profile\\\",\\r\\n    );\\r\\n  },\\r\\n  async getEoatLocation(\\r\\n    identifier: string,\\r\\n    fetcher?: typeof fetch,\\r\\n  ): Promise<EoatLocation> {\\r\\n    return assertObject<EoatLocation>(\\r\\n      await requestJson(\\r\\n        `/api/v1/eoats/${encodeURIComponent(identifier)}/current-location`,\\r\\n        fetcher,\\r\\n      ),\\r\\n      [\\\"state\\\", \\\"source\\\", \\\"confidence\\\", \\\"resolution_status\\\", \\\"evidence\\\"],\\r\\n      \\\"current-location\\\",\\r\\n    );\\r\\n  },\\r\\n  async getEoatRelationships(\\r\\n    identifier: string,\\r\\n    fetcher?: typeof fetch,\\r\\n  ): Promise<EoatRelationship[]> {\\r\\n    return assertArray<EoatRelationship>(\\r\\n      await requestJson(\\r\\n        `/api/v1/eoats/${encodeURIComponent(identifier)}/relationships`,\\r\\n        fetcher,\\r\\n      ),\\r\\n      \\\"relationships\\\",\\r\\n    );\\r\\n  },\\r\\n  async getEoatDocuments(\\r\\n    identifier: string,\\r\\n    fetcher?: typeof fetch,\\r\\n  ): Promise<WebDocument[]> {\\r\\n    return assertArray<WebDocument>(\\r\\n      await requestJson(\\r\\n        `/api/v1/eoats/${encodeURIComponent(identifier)}/web-documents`,\\r\\n        fetcher,\\r\\n      ),\\r\\n      \\\"browser-safe documents\\\",\\r\\n    );\\r\\n  },\\r\\n  async getEoatPhotos(\\r\\n    identifier: string,\\r\\n    fetcher?: typeof fetch,\\r\\n  ): Promise<WebPhoto[]> {\\r\\n    return assertArray<WebPhoto>(\\r\\n      await requestJson(\\r\\n        `/api/v1/eoats/${encodeURIComponent(identifier)}/web-photos`,\\r\\n        fetcher,\\r\\n      ),\\r\\n      \\\"browser-safe photos\\\",\\r\\n    );\\r\\n  },\\r\\n  async getEoatHistory(\\r\\n );\\r\\n  },\\r\\n};\\r\\n{\\r\\n  \\\"name\\\": \\\"eoat-atlas-web\\\",\\r\\n  \\\"private\\\": true,\\r\\n  \\\"version\\\": \\\"0.1.0\\\",\\r\\n  \\\"type\\\": \\\"module\\\",\\r\\n stmt.where(\\r\\n                    or_(\\r\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\r\\n\\r\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\\r\\n\\r\\nfrom sqlalchemy import func, or_, select, text\\r\\nfrom version_num FROM alembic_version LIMIT 1\\\"))\\r\\n\\r\\n    def database_server_version(self) -> str:\\r\\n        return str(self.session.scalar(text(\\\"SELECT VERSION()\\\")) or \\\"\\\")\\r\\n\\r\\n    def fit_check(self, request: FitCheckRequest, *, evaluated_at: datetime | None = None) -> FitCheckResult:\\r\\n        evaluated_at = evaluated_at or datetime.now(timezone.utc)\\r\\n\\r\\n        def asset_is_available(value) -> bool:\\r\\n            if value is None or not value.is_active:\\r\\n                return False\\r\\n            if value.status_id is None:\\r\\n                return True\\r\\n            status_code = self.session.scalar(\\r\\n                select(db.AssetStatus.code).where(db.AssetStatus.id == value.status_id)\\r\\n            )\\r\\n            return (status_code or \\\"\\\").strip().casefold() != \\\"archived\\\"\\r\\n\\r\\n        def invalid_input(reason: str, unknown_relationship: str) -> FitCheckResult:\\r\\n            unknown = PairCompatibility(pair=\\\"unresolved_input\\\", result=\\\"NOT_EVALUATED\\\", reason=reason)\\r\\n            return FitCheckResult(\\r\\n                overall_result=\\\"INVALID_INPUT\\\",\\r\\n                machine_tool_result=unknown,\\r\\n                machine_eoat_result=unknown,\\r\\n                tool_eoat_result=unknown,\\r\\n                reasons=[reason],\\r\\n                warnings=[],\\r\\n                unknown_relationships=[unknown_relationship],\\r\\n                alternative_compatible_eoats=[],\\r\\n            )\\r\\n\\r\\n        machine_query = select(db.Machine).where(db.Machine.machine_number == request.machine_number)\\r\\n        if request.plant_code:\\r\\n            machine_query = machine_query.join(db.Plant, db.Plant.id == db.Machine.plant_id).where(\\r\\n                db.Plant.plant_code == request.plant_code,\\r\\n                db.Plant.is_active.is_(True),\\r\\n            )\\r\\n        machine_candidates = list(self.session.scalars(machine_query.order_by(db.Machine.id)).all())\\r\\n        machines = [value for value in machine_candidates if asset_is_available(value)]\\r\\n        if len(machines) > 1:\\r\\n            return invalid_input(\\r\\n                \\\"Machine number is ambiguous across plants; plant_code is required.\\\",\\r\\n                \\\"machine\\\",\\r\\n            )\\r\\n        machine = machines[0] if machines else None\\r\\n        tool_candidates = list(\\r\\n            self.session.scalars(\\r\\n            select(db.Tool).where(\\r\\n                (db.Tool.business_identifier == request.tool_number) | (db.Tool.tool_number == request.tool_number)\\r\\n                ).order_by(db.Tool.id)\\r\\n            ).all()\\r\\n        )\\r\\n        if len(tool_candidates) > 1:\\r\\n            return invalid_input(\\\"Tool identifier is ambiguous; use its unique business identifier.\\\", \\\"tool\\\")\\r\\n        tool = tool_candidates[0] if tool_candidates else None\\r\\n        eoat = self.session.scalar(\\r\\n            select(db.EOAT).where(\\r\\n                (db.EOAT.business_identifier == request.eoat_identifier)\\r\\n                | (db.EOAT.legacy_identifier == request.eoat_identifier)\\r\\n            )\\r\\n        )\\r\\n        unavailable = []\\r\\n        if machine_candidates and machine is None:\\r\\n            unavailable.append(\\\"machine\\\")\\r\\n        unavailable.extend(\\r\\n            name for name, value in tuple[Path, ...]:\n+    \"\"\"Read configured browser roots; an absent or invalid setting permits nothing.\"\"\"\n+    raw_roots = [value.strip() for value in os.getenv(\"EOAT_WEB_CONTENT_ROOTS\", \"\").split(os.pathsep) if value.strip()]\n+    roots: list[Path] = []\n+    for raw_root in raw_roots:\n+        try:\n+            root = Path(raw_root).expanduser().resolve(strict=True)\n+        except OSError:\n+            LOGGER.warning(\"web_content_root_unavailable\")\n+            continue\n+        if root.is_dir():\n+            roots.append(root)\n+    return tuple(roots)\n+\n+\n+def safe_download_name(file_name: str) -> str:\n+    name = _SAFE_FILENAME.sub(\"-\", Path(file_name).name).strip(\" .-\")\n+    return name or \"eoat-atlas-file\"\n+\n+\n+def _reject_unsafe_path(raw_path: str, roots: tuple[Path, ...]) -> Path:\n+    if not roots:\n+        raise APIError(503, \"WEB_CONTENT_UNAVAILABLE\", \"Content is not available through the web interface.\", retryable=True)\n+    decoded = unquote(raw_path)\n+    if decoded != raw_path or \"..\" in raw_path.replace(\"\\\\\", \"/\").split(\"/\"):\n+        LOGGER.warning(\"web_content_rejected_encoded_or_traversal_path\")\n+        raise APIError(403, \"WEB_CONTENT_FORBIDDEN\", \"Content is not available through the web interface.\")\n+    try:\n+        candidate = Path(raw_path).expanduser()\n+        if not candidate.is_absolute():\n+            raise ValueError(\"relative path\")\n+        resolved = candidate.resolve(strict=True)\n+    except (OSError, ValueError):\n+        LOGGER.warning(\"web_content_rejected_missing_or_invalid_path\")\n+        raise APIError(404, \"WEB_CONTENT_UNAVAILABLE\", \"Content is not available through the web interface.\") from None\n+    if not resolved.is_file() or not any(resolved.is_relative_to(root) for root in roots):\n+        LOGGER.warning(\"web_content_rejected_outside_approved_root\")\n+        raise APIError(403, \"WEB_CONTENT_FORBIDDEN\", \"Content is not available through the web interface.\")\n+    return resolved\n+\n+\n+def _media_type(document: db.Document, path: Path) -> str:\n+    declared = (document.mime_type or \"\").strip().casefold()\n+    guessed = (mimetypes.guess_type(path.name)[0] or \"\").casefold()\n+    candidate = declared if declared in _INLINE_TYPES | {\"application/octet-stream\"} else guessed\n+    if candidate in _INLINE_TYPES | {\"application/octet-stream\"}:\n+        return candidate\n+    return \"application/octet-stream\"\n+\n+\n+def _document(session: Session, document_uuid: str, *, photo_only: bool | None = None) -> db.Document:\n+    document = session.scalar(select(db.Document).where(db.Document.document_uuid == document_uuid))\n+    if document is None:\n+        raise not_found(\"Document\", document_uuid)\n+    photo = session.scalar(select(db.Photo).where(db.Photo.document_id == document.id))\n+    if photo_only is True and photo is None:\n+        raise not_found(\"Photo\", document_uuid)\n+    if photo_only is False and photo is not None:\n+        raise not_found(\"Document\", document_uuid)\n+    return document\n+\n+\n+def content_is_available(storage_path: str) -> bool:\n+    \"\"\"Safe metadata hint only; no path or root is exposed to clients.\"\"\"\n+    try:\n+        _reject_unsafe_path(storage_path, approved_content_roots())\n+    except APIError:\n+        return False\n+    return True\n+\n+\n+def content_response(session: Session, document_uuid: str, *, photo_only: bool | None = None):\n+    document = _document(session, document_uuid, photo_only=photo_only)\n+    path = _reject_unsafe_path(document.storage_path, approved_content_roots())\n+    media_type = _media_type(document, path)\n+    disposition = \"inline\" if media_type in _INLINE_TYPES else \"attachment\"\n+    response = FileResponse(path, media_type=media_type, filename=safe_download_name(document.file_name), content_disposition_type=disposition)\n+    response.headers[\"X-Content-Type-Options\"] = \"nosniff\"\n+    return response\n+\n+\n+def thumbnail_response(session: Session, document_uuid: str):\n+    document = _document(session, document_uuid, photo_only=True)\n+    path = _reject_unsafe_path(document.storage_path, approved_content_roots())\n+    if _media_type(document, path) not in _THUMBNAIL_TYPES:\n+        raise APIError(409, \"THUMBNAIL_UNAVAILABLE\", \"A thumbnail is not available for this photo.\")\n+    try:\n+        from PIL import Image\n+\n+        with Image.open(path) as image:\n+            image.thumbnail((640, 640))\n+            if image.mode not in {\"RGB\", \"L\"}:\n+                image = image.convert(\"RGB\")\n+            buffer = io.BytesIO()\n+            image.save(buffer, format=\"JPEG\", quality=84, optimize=True)\n+    except (OSError, ValueError):\n+        LOGGER.warning(\"web_thumbnail_generation_failed\")\n+        raise APIError(409, \"THUMBNAIL_UNAVAILABLE\", \"A thumbnail is not available for this photo.\") from None\n+    response = StreamingResponse(iter([buffer.getvalue()]), media_type=\"image/jpeg\")\n+    response.headers[\"X-Content-Type-Options\"] = \"nosniff\"\n+    response.headers[\"Content-Disposition\"] = f'inline; `${relationship.identifier} — ${relationship.display_name}`\n+          : relationship.identifier;\n+        return (\n+          <li key={`${relationship.relationship_type}-${relationship.identifier}`}>\n+            <small>{relationship.relationship_type}</small>\n+            {path ? <Link to={path}>{label}</Link> : <span>{label}</span>}\n+            <small>{[relationship.status, relationship.reason].filter(Boolean).join(\" · \")}</small>\n+          </li>\n+        );\n+      })}\n+    </ul>\n+  );\n+}\n+\n+export function PhotoGallery({ photos }: { photos: WebPhoto[] }) {\n+  if (photos.length === 0)\n+    return <EmptyState title=\"No photos linked\">No browser-safe photo metadata is recorded for this profile.</EmptyState>;\n+  return (\n+    <div className=\"photo-gallery\">\n+      {photos.map((photo) => (\n+        <figure key={photo.document_uuid} className=\"photo-card\">\n+          {photo.content_delivery_state === \"AVAILABLE\" ? (\n+            <a href={apiClient.photoContentUrl(photo.document_uuid)} target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer\">\n+              <img\n+                src={apiClient.photoThumbnailUrl(photo.document_uuid)}\n+                alt={photo.caption || photo.title || photo.file_name}\n+                loading=\"lazy\"\n+              />\n+            </a>\n+          ) : (\n+            <div className=\"media-unavailable\" role=\"img\" aria-label={`Photo unavailable: ${photo.title}`}>\n+              Photo unavailable\n+            </div>\n+          )}\n+          <figcaption>\n+            <strong>{photo.title}</strong>\n+            <span>{photo.caption || photo.file_name}</span>\n+          </figcaption>\n+        </figure>\n+      ))}\n+    </div>\n+  );\n+}\n+\n+export function DocumentList({ documents }: { documents: WebDocument[] }) {\n+  if (documents.length === 0)\n+    return <EmptyState title=\"No documents linked\">No browser-safe document metadata is recorded for this profile.</EmptyState>;\n+  return (\n+    <ul className=\"metadata-list\">\n+      {documents.map((document) => (\n+        <li key={document.document_uuid}>\n+          <strong>{document.title}</strong>\n+          <span>{document.file_name}{document.mime_type ? ` · ${document.mime_type}` : \"\"}</span>\n+          <small>{document.description || \"No description provided.\"}</small>\n+          {document.content_delivery_state === \"AVAILABLE\" ? (\n+            <a href={apiClient.documentContentUrl(document.document_uuid)} target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer\">\n+              {document.mime_type === \"application/pdf\" ? \"View PDF\" : \"Download document\"}\n+            </a>\n+          ) : (\n+            <small>Not available through the web interface.</small>\n+          )}\n+        </li>\n+      ))}\n+    </ul>\n+  );\n+}\n+\n+export function HistoryList({ events }: { events: HistoryEvent[] }) {\n+  if (events.length === 0)\n+    return <EmptyState title=\"No history recorded\">No history events are recorded for this profile.</EmptyState>;\n+  return (\n+    <ol className=\"history-list\">\n+      {events.map((event) => (\n+        <li key={event.event_id}>\n+          <strong>{event.event_type}</strong>\n+          {event.occurred_at && <time>{new Date(event.occurred_at).toLocaleString()}</time>}\n+          <p>{event.description || event.summary}</p>\n+          {(event.actor || event.source_record_type) && <small>Source: {[event.actor, event.source_record_type].filter(Boolean).join(\" · \")}</small>}\n+        </li>\n+      ))}\n+    </ol>\n+  );\n+}\n*** Add File: //gwplastics.com/VT/Users/kgray/My Documents/eoat-web-foundation-phase0/web/src/components/qr/QrLabel.tsx\n+import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n+import QRCode from \"qrcode\";\n+import { entityPath, type EntityCategory } from \"@/api/routes\";\n+\n+export function canonicalQrPayload(category: EntityCategory, identifier: string, origin: string): string {\n+  return new URL(entityPath(category, identifier), origin).toString();\n+}\n+\n+export function isUnsafeQrOrigin(origin: string): boolean {\n+  try {\n+    const host = new URL(origin).hostname;\n+    return host === \"localhost\" || host === \"127.0.0.1\" || host === \"::1\" || host.endsWith(\".local\");\n+  } catch {\n+    return true;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+export function QrLabel({ category, identifier }: { category: EntityCategory; identifier: string }) {\n+  const origin = window.location.origin;\n+  const payload = canonicalQrPayload(category, identifier, origin);\n+  const unsafe = isUnsafeQrOrigin(origin);\n+  const [image, setImage] = useState<string>();\n+\n+  useEffect(() => {\n+    QRCode.toDataURL(payload, { errorCorrectionLevel: \"M\", margin: 3, width: 320 }).then(setImage).catch(() => setImage(undefined));\n+  }, [payload]);\n+\n+  return (\n+    <section className=\"qr-label\" aria-labelledby=\"qr-label-title\">\n+      <h2 id=\"qr-label-title\">QR label</h2>\n+      <div className=\"qr-label__body\">\n+        {image ? <img src={image} alt={`QR code for ${payload}`} /> : <p role=\"status\">Generating QR code…</p>}\n+        <div>\n+          <strong>EOAT Atlas · {category}</strong>\n+          <span>{identifier}</span>\n+          <code>{payload}</code>\n+          {unsafe && <p className=\"qr-warning\" role=\"alert\">This origin is not suitable for a durable production label. Printing is disabled.</p>}\n+          <button type=\"button\" onClick={() => window.print()} disabled={unsafe || !image}>Print label</button>\n+        </div>\n+      </div>\n+    </section>\n+  );\n+}\n*** End Patch";

<LoadingState label=\"Loading history…\" /> : history.isError ? <><ErrorState error={history.error} /><Retry retry={() => history.refetch()} /></> : <HistoryList events={history.data || []} />}</ProfileSection>\n+      <QrLabel category=\"tool\" identifier={profile.business_identifier} />\n+    </div>\n+  </>;\n+}\n+\n+export function ToolProfilePage() {\n+  const location = useLocation();\n+  const identifier = decodeRouteIdentifier(location.pathname, \"tool\");\n+  const profile = useQuery({ queryKey: [\"tool\", identifier, \"profile\"], queryFn: () => apiClient.getToolProfile(identifier!), enabled: !!identifier });\n+  if (!identifier) return <section className=\"profile-page\"><NotFoundState entityName=\"Tool\" identifier=\"invalid identifier\" /></section>;\n+  if (profile.isPending) return <section className=\"profile-page\"><LoadingState label=\"Loading tool profile…\" /></section>;\n+  if (profile.error instanceof ApiError && profile.error.kind === \"not-found\") return <section className=\"profile-page\"><NotFoundState entityName=\"Tool\" identifier={identifier} /></section>;\n+  if (profile.isError) return <section className=\"profile-page\"><ErrorState error={profile.error} /><Retry retry={() => profile.refetch()} /></section>;\n+  return <section className=\"profile-page\"><ToolContent identifier={identifier} profile={profile.data} /></section>;\n+}\n*** End Patch";
const r = await tools.apply_patch(patch);
text(JSON.stringify(r));

}\n+.qr-label { margin-top: 1rem; }\n+.qr-label h2 { font-size: 1.35rem; }\n+.qr-label__body { grid-template-columns: minmax(9rem, 16rem) minmax(0, 1fr); align-items: center; }\n+.qr-label img { width: min(100%, 16rem); background: white; image-rendering: auto; }\n+.qr-label code { display: block; overflow-wrap: anywhere; font-size: 0.8rem; }\n+.qr-warning { color: var(--danger); font-weight: 650; }\n+.fit-result { margin-top: 1.5rem; }\n+.fit-result h3 { margin-top: 0; text-transform: capitalize; }\n+@media (max-width: 760px) {\n+  .library-controls,\n+  .fit-check-form { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n+  .qr-label__body { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n+}\n+@media print {\n+  .site-header,\n+  .site-footer,\n+  .navigation,\n+  .qr-label button,\n+  .qr-warning,\n+  .profile-sections > :not(.qr-label) { display: none !important; }\n+  .site-main,\n+  .profile-page,\n+  .qr-label { width: 100%; max-width: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; border: 0; box-shadow: none; }\n+  .qr-label { display: block; }\n+}\n*** End Patch";
const r = await tools.apply_patch(patch);
text(JSON.stringify(r));
